creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
This part of the google code announcement, "throughout the rest of 2016".
(https://opensource.googleblog.com/2015/03/farewell-to-google-code.html)

> January 25, 2016 - The project hosting service is closed. You will be able
> to download a tarball of project source, issues, and wikis. These tarballs
> will be available throughout the rest of 2016.

I'm sorry if I concluded wrong?
